issue: deep-link activity with custom URI scheme and no permission

details.reason: Activity 'com.google.android.gms.tagmanager.TagManagerPreviewActivity' registers the custom URI scheme 'tagmanager.c.mobi.mifon://' without a permission guard. Any app can trigger this activity by crafting an Intent with a matching URI.
